# Logic → Xor

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Logic → Xor

Xor

Instruction Type and Width   Instruction description

Performs semi-complex logic-XOR operation between 2-bit
                             complex sources (16 sources per 32-bit vx[X]) and 1-bit real
                             sources (16 sources per vy[Y]p). The Logix-XOR operation is
Vector Semi-Complex XOR
                             performed on a bit-by-bit basis and the results are written into
                             either 32-bit or 40-bit complex destination according to the
                             register type.
                             Performs logic-XOR operation between two 32-bit or 40-bit
Vector XOR                   sources into either 32-bit or 40-bit destination according to the
                             register type.
